name: ASUS ROG MAXIMUS Z790 HERO ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7800+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - ROG HYPER M.2 Card - 2x USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: ASUS ROG MAXIMUS Z790 HERO ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 2x
description: ATX Z790 flagship ROG motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 socket with dual PCIe 5.0 and premium features.
